steps.t: Jetsam from Lake Nenuial often washes onto the western shore of Tinnudir, north of the Ranger-camp. Astiul has asked you to follow the island's shore …
Astiul is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir in Evendim, south of the jetsam-littered shore. The Ranger Astiul waits for you to return with …
